title: Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela
tagline: Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: The Cathedral Of The Sacred Heart is a Roman Catholic cathedral belonging to the Roman Catholic Diocese of Rourkela and one of the oldest church buildings in Rourkela, India.
overview.description: The Cathedral Of The Sacred Heart is a Roman Catholic cathedral belonging to the Roman Catholic Diocese of Rourkela and one of the oldest church buildings in Rourkela, India. Together with St. Pauls's School, St. Joseph's School, Carmel School and Hamirpur High School.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Rourkela
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Rourkela (Latin: Rurkelaën(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Rourkela in the ecclesiastical province of Cuttack-Bhubaneswar in India.

topPlaces.name: Tribal Museum Rourkela
topPlaces.description: The Tribal Research and Cultural Museum (Odia: ରାଉରକେଲା ଆଦିବାସୀ ଗବେଷଣା ଓ ସାଂସ୍କୃତିକ ସଂଗ୍ରହାଳୟ; Oriya: Rāurakelā ādibāsī gabēṣaṇā o sāṁskr̥tika saṅgrahāḷaya), also referred to as the Tribal Museum, is a cultural museum located in Rourkela city in the state of Odisha. The museum is dedicated to the preservation, documentation, and exhibition of the state's cultural heritage of tribal communities.

topPlaces.name: Ambagan, Rourkela
topPlaces.description: Ambagan, also known as Ispat Super Market, is a local market business place located in sector 19 of Rourkela. The place is famous for its various local shops settled around the area with shops ranging from commodities to vegetable markets.

topPlaces.name: Home and Hope, Rourkela
topPlaces.description: Home and Hope, Rourkela (Hindi: होम एंड होप) is a non-profit organization that has been working to meet the needs and protect the interests and rights for disabled people. The special school for the welfare of mentally disabled children provides boarding and lodging facility in the school, maintaining the children with care.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya Karaikudi
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya karaikudi is a system of central government schools under the Ministry of Human Resource Development (India). It's located in the Chettinad region of Karaikudi, CECRI Campus.

topPlaces.name: Ispat Stadium
topPlaces.description: Ispat Stadium is a cricket stadium located in Rourkela, Odisha, India. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket and other sports.

topPlaces.name: Biju Patnaik Hockey Stadium
topPlaces.description: Biju Patnaik Hockey Stadium is a hockey stadium in Rourkela, Odisha. The stadium was constructed and maintained by SAIL. It was possible due to initiatives taken by Late Bipin Behari Panda and M. Kindo in early 90s.

topPlaces.name: KoelNagar
topPlaces.description: Koelnagar (Official name Koel Nagar) is a town in Rourkela, Sundargarh district of Odisha, India. Koelnagar comes under Rourkela municipality as Ward no 28 (A, D, E Block area) and Ward no 29 (B & C Block).

items.note: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Rourkela (Latin: Rurkelaën(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Rourkela in the ecclesiastical province of Cuttack-Bhubaneswar in India.

The Tribal Research and Cultural Museum (Odia: ରାଉରକେଲା ଆଦିବାସୀ ଗବେଷଣା ଓ ସାଂସ୍କୃତିକ ସଂଗ୍ରହାଳୟ; Oriya: Rāurakelā ādibāsī gabēṣaṇā o sāṁskr̥tika saṅgrahāḷaya), also referred to as the Tribal Museum, is a cultural museum located in Rourkela city in the state of Odisha. The museum is dedicated to the preservation, documentation, and exhibition of the state's cultural heritage of tribal communities.

Ambagan, also known as Ispat Super Market, is a local market business place located in sector 19 of Rourkela. The place is famous for its various local shops settled around the area with shops ranging from commodities to vegetable markets.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Biju Patnaik Hockey Stadium & around

items.note: Biju Patnaik Hockey Stadium is a hockey stadium in Rourkela, Odisha. The stadium was constructed and maintained by SAIL. It was possible due to initiatives taken by Late Bipin Behari Panda and M. Kindo in early 90s.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (125 km) and the nearest railway station is Sambalpur Junction (128 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela?
faq.a: Stays in Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sacred Heart Cathedral, Rourkela?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Rourkela, Tribal Museum Rourkela, Ambagan, Rourkela, Home and Hope, Rourkela, Kendriya Vidyalaya Karaikudi.
